---
title: "Boruta"
author: "Max Ranz de la Iglesia"
date: "2026-04-08"
output: html_document
---

# Boruta
```{r}
setwd("D:/Descargas")
load("D:/Descargas/dades_escenari_nul_reduit.RData")
library(Boruta)

# =========================
# Resultats
# =========================
resultats_fp_boruta <- data.frame(
  N = integer(),
  pi = numeric(),
  correlation = numeric(),
  FP = numeric(),
  FP_percent = numeric()
)

# =========================
# Iteracions per escenaris i simulacions
# =========================
system.time({
  for (i in seq_len(nrow(comb))) {
    
    N <- comb$N[i]
    pi <- comb$pi[i]
    correlation <- comb$correlation[i]
    
    fp_boruta <- numeric(iters)
    
    for (j in 1:iters) {
      
      cat("Escenari", i, "- Simulació", j, "\n")
      
      X_df <- as.data.frame(X[[i]][[j]])
      y_fac <- Y[[i]][[j]]
      
      df_boruta <- data.frame(y = y_fac, X_df)
      
      # Boruta (sense trace)
      model_boruta <- suppressWarnings(Boruta(y ~ ., data = df_boruta, doTrace = 0))
      
      # Variables seleccionades com a rellevants
      seleccionades <- getSelectedAttributes(model_boruta, withTentative = FALSE)
      
      # Comptem nombre de variables seleccionades
      fp_boruta[j] <- ifelse(length(seleccionades) == 0, 0, length(seleccionades))
    }
    
    # Guardem resultats
    resultats_fp_boruta <- rbind(
      resultats_fp_boruta,
      data.frame(
        N = N,
        pi = pi,
        correlation = correlation,
        FP = mean(fp_boruta),
        FP_percent = mean(fp_boruta)/num_vars
      )
    )
  }
})

# =========================
# Mostra i desa resultats
# =========================
print(resultats_fp_boruta)
save(resultats_fp_boruta, file = "resultats_fp_boruta.RData")
```
